docs.content: the staging database is postgres running on fly.io
production runs on a managed postgres cluster with read replicas
the daily engineering stand-up is at 9am eastern
we deploy to production on fridays after code review
the team prefers tabs over spaces in the editor config
auth uses short-lived JWTs minted from API keys
the error ERR_4517_TIMEOUT means the auth handshake exceeded its deadline
we cache brain queries in redis for five minutes

queries.text: what database do we use for staging
when do we ship to production
